seed_data_creation: Created test VW entries with g_issued values (5000, 3500, 2000, 6000, 4500) during backend testing - all cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: G.Issued field and Source rename fully implemented and tested. Vehicle Weight form has G.Issued input (data-testid='vw-g-issued') and Source label (data-testid='vw-farmer'). Completed entries tables in both VehicleWeight and AutoWeightEntries show Source and G.Issued columns. Backend APIs save/edit/return g_issued field correctly. PDF slip and Excel/PDF exports include G.Issued. View modal shows Source label and G.Issued value. What's New modal (v70.0.0) confirms these features.
